Two ways to use AllByRent

Whether you want to earn or save — this is for you

Earn mode

List your items.
Make money.

Got tools, gear, or equipment sitting idle? List them in 3 minutes. Every rental puts money in your pocket — insured and tracked.

  • ✓ List any physical item
  • ✓ Set your own price
  • ✓ AI fills the listing for you
  • ✓ Insurance on every rental
Save mode

Rent instead of buy.
Save money.

Need a pressure washer for one weekend? A camera kit for a trip? Rent from a verified neighbor. Fraction of the cost, zero storage.

  • ✓ Browse local listings
  • ✓ Pay only for what you need
  • ✓ Verified owners only
  • ✓ Travelers welcome too

One account — switch between Earn and Save anytime

Earn mode

Everything in your garage can pay you back

Camera gear, power tools, camping equipment — someone nearby needs it today. List in 3 minutes, earn while you sleep.

Rent mode

Need it for a weekend? Rent it.

Why buy when your neighbor has it? Browse verified listings, pay with Stripe, pick up the same day.

How it works

Three steps to your first rental

1

Snap & list

Photo → AI fills title, category, and suggests price. Under 3 minutes from photo to live listing.

2

Renter books & pays

Stripe payment, insurance added automatically, identity verified on both sides. You get notified instantly.

3

QR handoff & earn

Renter scans QR on pickup, scans again on return. Every timestamp is legal evidence. Payout hits your account.

Four modes

One item. Four ways to offer it.

Rent

Daily income

Daily, weekly, monthly. Insured every time.

Sell

One-time sale

Direct purchase. No insurance needed.

Rent to Own

Monthly payments

They pay monthly, own it at the end.

Gift

Give freely

No charge. No commission. Just goodwill.

Trust & safety

Built so strangers can trust each other

Identity verified

Stripe Identity — government ID + selfie. One-time per account.

Insured by Safely

Every rental covered against damage or loss. Automatic.

QR tracking

Scan in, scan out. Every timestamp is legal evidence.

Blind reviews

Both sides review independently. Published only when both submit.

For travelers

Traveling? Rent locally.

Don't pack it all. Search by city, find verified owners, insured rentals wherever you land.

No shipping. No hassle. Just rent what you need, where you are.

Meet Mr. Rentano

Your AI guide.
Always on.

No support tickets. No hold music. No waiting.

🕐 24/7 🌍 Any language 🎙️ Voice or text

Dispute support

Speaks any language — Arabic, Chinese, French, Hindi and more

Install in seconds

Add to your home screen

No app store. No download. Works like a native app.

iPhone / iPad
iOS 16.4+, Safari only
1

Open allbyrent.com in Safari

Must be Safari — Chrome won't show install

2

Tap the Share button

Square with arrow — bottom center of Safari

3

Tap "Add to Home Screen"

Scroll down in the share sheet if needed

4

Tap "Add" — done

AllByRent icon appears on home screen

Android
Chrome browser
1

Open allbyrent.com in Chrome

Chrome detects the PWA automatically

2

Tap the install banner

"Install AllByRent" appears at the bottom

3

Or: tap ⋮ → "Add to Home screen"

If banner didn't appear automatically

4

Tap "Install" — done

Full screen, no browser bar

No storage used · No updates needed · Always the latest version

Ready to start?

Open and install. That's it.

No Apple tax. No Google cut. Add to home screen in one tap.
